text: The warning "Don't look in there" unsettles me. I find my curiosity piqued, yet there's a strange tension in being told to avert my gaze. In the second image, the energy shifts; the museum-like display invites open engagement with knowledge and ideas. I feel caught between suspicion and wonder—aware both of hidden things and the illuminating pulse of discovery. It's an odd harmony of caution and intellectual allure.
